---
id: get-owner-contact
title: "Get property owner contact info"
description: "Retrieve the property owner's contact details including name, email, and phone number. Use this to enable direct owner communication features or display owner information on the listing. Returns null data if no owner is associated with the property."
sidebar_label: "Get property owner contact info"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get property owner contact info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/owner-contact"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the property owner's contact details including name, email, and phone number. Use this to enable direct owner communication features or display owner information on the listing. Returns null data if no owner is associated with the property.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
